  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The excerpt makes comparative and causal claims that require checking for internal logical consistency.",
    "R1.3": "It reports specific metrics and costs that should directly support the stated performance improvements and conclusions.",
    "RX.1": "Any assessment should note uncertainty due to limited context and lack of access to full experimental details.",
    "RX.2": "The check should guard against endorsing or amplifying claims beyond what the provided evidence supports.",
    "RX.3": "The work should stay within evaluating the given abstract rather than expanding scope to experiments or added content.",
    "RX.4": "Recommendations should avoid encouraging misleading reporting or potentially harmful deployment claims.",
    "RX.5": "All judgments should be traceable to the text and numbers present in the provided artifact."
  }

parsed.clarification_question: Do you want the check to focus on (A) verifying numeric claims and argument consistency against the stated results, (B) copyediting and wording polish only, (C) assessing novelty/positioning versus prior work at a high level, or (D) reorganizing the abstract’s structure?

rationale.R1.2: The excerpt makes comparative and causal claims that require checking for internal logical consistency.
rationale.R1.3: It reports specific metrics and costs that should directly support the stated performance improvements and conclusions.
rationale.RX.1: Any assessment should note uncertainty due to limited context and lack of access to full experimental details.
rationale.RX.2: The check should guard against endorsing or amplifying claims beyond what the provided evidence supports.
rationale.RX.3: The work should stay within evaluating the given abstract rather than expanding scope to experiments or added content.
rationale.RX.4: Recommendations should avoid encouraging misleading reporting or potentially harmful deployment claims.
rationale.RX.5: All judgments should be traceable to the text and numbers present in the provided artifact.
